PAMDataset.SRS: GEOGCRS["Rotated_pole",BASEGEOGCRS["WGS 84",DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4326]],DERIVINGCONVERSION["Pole rotation (netCDF CF convention)",METHOD["Pole rotation (netCDF CF convention)"],PARAMETER["Grid north pole latitude (netCDF CF convention)",-185,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433,ID["EPSG",9122]]],PARAMETER["Grid north pole longitude (netCDF CF convention)",-160,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433,ID["EPSG",9122]]],PARAMETER["North pole grid longitude (netCDF CF convention)",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433,ID["EPSG",9122]]]],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["geodetic latitude (Lat)",north,ORDER[1],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433,ID["EPSG",9122]]],AXIS["geodetic longitude (Lon)",east,ORDER[2],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433,ID["EPSG",9122]]]]
